steps.title: Find the one unit factor
steps.content:
When $w$ increases by $1$, the exponent $3w$ increases by $3$. So the function value is multiplied by
$$(0.84)^3$$

steps.title: Evaluate the factor
steps.content:
Compute the multiplier.
$$(0.84)^3=0.592704$$
So the new value is about $59.2704\%$ of the previous value.

steps.title: Convert to percent decrease
steps.content:
Subtract from $100\%$.
$$100-59.2704=40.7296$$
This is closest to $40.7$.
The answer is A.
